modules.name: crawl
modules.purpose: Coleta multi-source de licitações e contratos de 8 fontes (PNCP, DOM-SC, PCP, ComprasGov, SC Compras, TCE-SC, Transparência, Contratos), normalização para schema unificado, upsert no DataLake e entity matching com órgãos SC via cascade CNPJ → nome → fuzzy.

functions.name: _match_entities_cascade
functions.returns: dict (stats: cnpj, name_normalized, fuzzy, unmatched, total)

functions.name: report_coverage
functions.returns: dict (groups, total_entities, total_covered, total_uncovered, by_source, uncovered_entities_200km)

business_rules.description: Entity matching: Level 1 CNPJ (score 1.0, confidence high), Level 2 name+municipio (score 1.0, confidence high), Level 3 fuzzy (threshold 0.85, confidence high/medium/low)
Content dedup: SHA-256 of objeto+valor+situacao canonicalized to lowercase
Source crawl orchestration: Crawl → Transform → Upsert → Entity Match → Coverage Update

algorithms.name: Entity Matching 3-Level Cascade
algorithms.description: Progressive fallback matching: CNPJ 8-digit exact → normalized name + IBGE constraint → fuzzy ratio with rapidfuzz/difflib. Each bid gets match_method, match_score, match_confidence logged.

algorithms.name: Content Hash Dedup
algorithms.description: SHA-256 hash of canonicalized business fields prevents redundant DB writes across crawl runs.

modules.name: intel
modules.purpose: Pipeline completo de inteligência para um CNPJ alvo: coleta → enriquecimento → LLM gate → extração de documentos → análise → validação → relatório (PDF + Excel). 7 stages com 5 quality gates.

functions.name: analyze_edital
functions.returns: dict (scores: hab, fin, geo, prazo, comp)

business_rules.description: 5 quality gates: GATE 1 coverage (>=80%), GATE 2 cadastral (CNPJ válido), GATE 3 ruído (LLM classificação), GATE 4 conteúdo (keywords engenharia), GATE 5 recomendação (score >= threshold)
Zero noise philosophy: LLM fallback = REJECT on failure. Only explicitly relevant editais pass.
5-dimension scoring: HAB (habilitação), FIN (financeiro), GEO (geográfico), PRAZO (timeline), COMP (competitivo)

algorithms.name: 7-Stage Pipeline with 5 Gates
algorithms.description: Sequential pipeline where each stage produces data consumed by the next gate. Gates can REJECT (stop pipeline), WARN (continue with flag), or PASS. Failed gates produce partial output.

algorithms.name: Sector Classification via LLM + Heuristics
algorithms.description: Two-tier classification: rule-based heuristics (strong_compat/strong_incompat patterns from YAML) first, LLM fallback for low-confidence cases. Each sector has independent CNAE prefixes, patterns, and exclusions.

modules.name: reports
modules.purpose: Geração de relatórios analíticos: panorama de mercado setorial, detecção de gaps de cobertura e relatório semanal. Output em terminal (Rich), Excel (openpyxl) e PDF (ReportLab).

business_rules.description: Panorama sections: volume, municípios, sazonalidade, concorrência, setores. Output multiplatform: terminal + Excel + PDF.

modules.name: lib
modules.purpose: Bibliotecas compartilhadas de domínio: normalização de nomes PT-BR, simulação de lance ótimo, estimativa de custos, perfil de vitória, tracking win/loss e templates de documentos.

business_rules.description: Name normalization: 7-step pipeline (NFKD → uppercase → remove punctuation → remove CNPJ → collapse whitespace → expand abbreviations → remove irrelevant)
Bid simulation: maximize P(win) × margin. Uses HHI for competitor count estimation, sector margin profiles, and historical discount distributions.
Victory profile: learns success patterns from won contracts — value range, preferred modalities, municipality sizes, keyword clusters, geographic proximity.

algorithms.name: Optimal Bid Calculation
algorithms.description: Iterates discount range (0-30%), calculates P(win) from historical distribution and expected competitors (via HHI), computes EV = P(win) × margin × estimated_value, selects discount maximizing EV.

algorithms.name: Victory Profile Learning
algorithms.description: Statistical profiling from historical contracts: value quartiles, modality frequency normalization, population bracket mapping, keyword frequency extraction, distance statistics.

modules.name: config
modules.purpose: Configuração centralizada: settings from env vars (12-factor), 13 setores com CNAEs e heurísticas em YAML, abreviações PT-BR e configuração de portais de transparência.

business_rules.description: 13 setores configurados com CNAE prefixes, sector_hints, heuristic_patterns (strong_compat, strong_incompat, weak_compat), cross_sector_exclusions, competition_keywords, weight_profile, base_win_rate, habilitacao, timeline_rules, priority_modalidades, cnae_gate_threshold.
All configuration from env vars with sensible defaults. No hardcoded credentials.

modules.name: db
modules.purpose: Schema, 12 migrations SQL, seed de 2.085 órgãos SC e script de setup do PostgreSQL. Implementa FTS PT-BR, upsert RPC, cascade matching e tracking de cobertura.

business_rules.description: PostgreSQL 17 with pg_trgm (trigram similarity) and uuid-ossp extensions.
Full-text search in Portuguese via TSVECTOR with GIN index. Pre-computed tsv column.
Soft delete via is_active flag. Most queries filter is_active=TRUE.
Auto-update updated_at via trigger set_updated_at().

modules.name: deploy
modules.purpose: Deployment no Hetzner VPS (Ubuntu 24.04) via systemd: 13 timers + 13 services + 1 template onFailure. Script de instalação automatizado.

business_rules.description: 13 systemd timers with staggered schedules to avoid API rate limiting. pncp-crawl-full daily 05:00, pncp-crawl-inc 3x/day (11:00, 17:00, 23:00), dom-sc-crawl 3x/day (06:00, 14:00, 22:00), etc.
onfailure@.service template: automatic failure notification for any service. Can be wired to Telegram/Sentry.

modules.name: docs
modules.purpose: Documentação técnica, de produto e de processo: arquitetura C4, PRD, stories EPIC-001, QA gates, pesquisas, guias e handoffs de sessão.

business_rules.description: Arquitetura documentada em C4 (Contexto + Containers) com fluxo de dados e decisões de arquitetura registradas.
EPIC-001: 7 stories implementadas para 100% cobertura SC (systemd timers, TCE-SC crawler, entity matching, seed entities, coverage monitoring, transparencia gap fill, coverage report).
